name: Team Kasich
subject: Our children's futures are at risk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Peter - The U.S. House just approved a two-year budget that once again adds to our national debt and f [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=435c4b41396a4fe782f6979ba0e40893&_e=bmFRS9INP3p7UJxLp_cqRiK56gkWE708af5JnACLi9vrmren3hqFpz6o_EZ-MaC0aSauM_PUz3GnjmLW9n4QFJvi6u8Fp3KQorkJAUNWrfpQTZZvYIj3ANKGRZEuY8B9qnb14x5eXmWQ6GwvoCBUMDh41cIQtMhrS7dxswPSDNnymhkyginZMC_fFD02iqGr8oo0kzVeBjYVapZd-kO0ZQoqmvFBZWiCD6j7q2v1qM6xBXJ0546CbgupGNdMWLM-SJgnO5hLf3re3fN_w1Abig%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter -

The U.S. House just approved a two-year budget that once again adds to our national debt and fails to rein in spending.

The consequences of piling debt upon debt is detrimental to our economic growth and national prosperity and really affects our children and grandchildren’s future.

It hasn’t always been this way. In fact, it’s hard to imagine that America had a budget surplus 20 years ago.

When I was chairman of the House Budget Committee, I was quarterback for a bipartisan team that in 1997 balanced the federal budget for the first time in a generation. The result was a new wave of economic renewal, lower taxes and a projected federal surplus of $5 trillion. But only three more years of balanced budgets followed, and things fell apart. The federal budget has never been balanced since and today America now finds itself $22 trillion in debt.

A nation so much in debt and so far from achieving budget stability is forsaking its fiscal reputation and risking the future of our children’s generation and beyond.

America has tremendous assets, but we may be squandering one that may mean the most: our good name as a wise and caring steward of the taxpayer’s money.

**If you'd like to help make a difference today,[please consider chipping in to support this message.](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=435c4b41396a4fe782f6979ba0e40893&_e=bmFRS9INP3p7UJxLp_cqRkBPnHGHNHSf_b3eioOjpJZtI4qxmDz3NNiQUAmHh94ofLJNZngefkgOY0ju4TGlRngOcfDdgvwGvv_t1Jj7u-Y0CWv0ZbkKiUYKNp7Gq6Mjq9ZLoXVXhaJHDuQqm832qHGktMwl_Gufm1VNGzCbpzBFQ1xXi2NAYpJbLG9bF1-setNHgn7mEy4B7jQAU67rRYQKnLotwS_Gx1GySc0QIfAw-SXDDtlGbh8wqye5euUbNIf0YVjl3HBF0cKxRRvfQA%3D%3D)**

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: We must end the cruel treatment of children at our borders. My plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2df62/6cd27893/4fb3a4c6/1580b3bf/1044474761/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Food. Diapers. Toothbrushes. You know,_the basics_. **Children separated from their families by Donald Trump, children jailed by our government, aren't even guaranteed**** _that_****.** This isn't complicated: **We must stop the cruel treatment of children in our custody.** My plan before Congress: End family separations, except in the most extreme cases where a child is in immediate danger. Ensure health and safety standards for detained children, including access to food, medical care, and hygiene products. Make it easier to place children, temporarily, with sponsors to get them out of our detention camps. Get them into family settings and out of prisons. Make sure legal counsel is available to all unaccompanied children. Ramp up public oversight of facilities where children are being kept. Shine a light on any atrocities being committed. This must happen _right now_. Each day we wait is another day children suffer on our watch. [**Sign the petition. Urge Congress to pass my plan to stop the cruel treatment of migrant children in U.S. custody.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2df62/6cd27893/4fb3a4c6/1580b3bc/1044474761/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/cruelty-act/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-07-cruelty-act-email") **_Jeff_** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2df62/6cd27893/4fb3a4c6/1580b3bc/1044474761/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/cruelty-act/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-07-cruelty-act-email") |

name: Kamala HQ
subject: Ambitious
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
This week, we’ve been ringing alarm bells because our campaign is behind on our fundraising goals for the month of July. And while our numbers have ticked up in the past few days, our projections say we’re still likely to fall short of where we need to be come July 31. **We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise more than $500,000 in grassroots contributions before Kamala takes the stage for next week’s presidential debate in Detroit. It’s going to be tough, but we can do it:** The clock is ticking here -- so we’re asking: Will you make a donation to our campaign before Kamala takes the stage for next week’s presidential debate? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190725-eom?refcode=ema190725-eom8-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5735_5755789_Gc2LAX&akid=5735%2E5755789%2EGc2LAX)

subject: Important Border Wall Update
body:
It's no secret that our border is in absolute chaos and crisis. While I'm fighting to support our Border Patrol, build the wall, and solve this crisis, among other commonsense national security solutions, Democrats have taken a totally different approach: No Images? While I'm fighting to support our Border Patrol, build the wall, and solve this crisis, among other commonsense national security solutions, Democrats have taken a totally different approach:

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Major news for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Less than two weeks after we announced out-raising Pete Olson, he announced he's retiring!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdMIUYZwU9BCmy4jFWxsObs7QYL_TP4abOGnwdy-qNI=/9KTwV__Z9My-AJiDlf_dwoO5HTXBqybJNkyYPAAB-ig=)

It's no secret that Congressman Olson and I disagree on the fundamental issues facing our country. But I join with the people of Texas' 22nd District to thank him for his service, and I wish him the best in his retirement.

Now is not the time to rest. Now is the time to fight harder than ever because this is one of the most competitive races in Texas and in the nation. It's time to ensure that we have leadership in Congress that believes in affordable and high-quality medical care, higher wages for working families, and a fair education system. [**I 'm all in, are you with me?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdMIUYZwU9BCmy4jFWxsObs7QYL_TP4abOGnwdy-qNI=/XnbxZds8tNOZZO1IiSypaZzhzJYG-x-H9DZlligNz7g=?refcode=0726<500)

We have an opportunity to heal the division in this country, to tear down the walls separating Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. Make no mistake, the contest ahead won't be easy - but the fights worth fighting never are. [**Chip in now to make sure we close the gap from last cycle and flip this District!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdMIUYZwU9BCmy4jFWxsObs7QYL_TP4abOGnwdy-qNI=/XnbxZds8tNOZZO1IiSypaZzhzJYG-x-H9DZlligNz7g=?refcode=0726<500)

Thank you!

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MSR1_OLvvLogU00PGdZ5-1Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=1)
| The Supreme Court has completed issuing their rulings for the 2018 and 2019 session and as we [highlighted last month](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MD-bmoOZckRD4a99_ebaMgQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=2), many of their decisions have been historic and remain critical for Christians. Below we highlighted three additional decisions issued by the Supreme Court in June of which we want to keep you apprised. **Here are three Supreme Court rulings worth noting:**
1. Kisor v. Wilkie
2. Lancu v. Brunetti
3. Manhattan Community Access Corp. v. Halleck

#### Kisor v. Wilkie
On June 26, 2019, the Supreme Court issued a unanimous decision in favor of veteran Kisor. The Court ruled that the lower court was wrong to defer to the agency in the case. Kisor, a retired United States Marine suffering from post-traumatic stress disorder, filed a disability claim for benefits in 1983 with the Department of Veterans Affairs, and his claim was denied. All nine members of the Court have sought to right this situation for Mr. Kisor, but it’s important to note that a majority were not willing to retire the Seminole Rock/Auer doctrine. The doctrine guides judges to defer to an administrative agency’s interpretation of a regulation, yet many argue this deference ensures administrative bureaucrats, rather than judges, are granted power to interpret the law. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MOG-7OFNWmvdyuQ-2iW2Pfw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=3).
#### lancu v. Brunetti
This case dealt with the use of vulgar trademarks and the freedom to apply for them under the First Amendment. In a 6-3 ruling, the Court affirmed Erik Brunetti has the right, protected by the First Amendment, to trademark his brand containing a vulgar word. The Supreme Court upheld the Federal Circuit Court’s ruling in this case. Erik Brunetti had previously attempted to register his clothing brand trademark with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office but was denied because of the vulgar word he was trying to trademark. While a majority on the Court has ruled that the First Amendment ensures Brunetti’s right to file for his trademark, this case does indicate a shift in our culture that Christians should notice; vulgar language is becoming more mainstream and marketable. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MGVcJ1vXixauWW_7SKwXtMQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=4).
#### Manhattan Community Access Corp. v. Halleck
In a close 5-4 decision the justices ruled that the Manhattan Neighborhood Network is not a state actor subject to the First Amendment. The Manhattan Neighborhood Network, located in New York City, suspended two of their employees, Melendez and Halleck, from using the network’s services or facilities after the employees incited violence against other employees. Melendez and Halleck then filed a lawsuit against Manhattan Neighborhood Network claiming the company violated their First Amendment rights to free speech. But as a majority of the justices concluded, the First Amendment does not apply to private institutions and only applies to state actors of which the Manhattan Neighborhood Network is not. This case was important because if the justices had ruled the Manhattan Neighborhood Market was a state actor, this would have substantially limited control of content from other content platform companies. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MvuwtlEJLq0_5wWJZVPYqJg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=5).
### PRAYER ALERT
Please continue to pray for the Coach Kennedy Case (Kennedy v. Bremerton School District). You may remember, Coach Kennedy was suspended and terminated for silently praying on the football field after high school games. The Supreme Court decided in January not to review the Kennedy case, but there is a silver lining. Four of the Supreme Court Justices issued a statement that said, “the Ninth Circuit’s understanding of the free speech rights of public school teachers is troubling and may justify review in the future.” Their statement further explained they needed more information to rule on the matter. According to First Liberty, they “are preparing to return to the district court in order to resolve the issues the Supreme Court identified.” Please pray for First Liberty as they continue to fight for Coach Kenney’s most fundamental First Amendment Rights.
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190726com01&n=9)

name: Robert Foster
subject: Critical Campaign Deadline
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Friend - This week we had our final GOP debate before election day. I hope I showed you that I am not afraid to go to bat for you as governor - and that I am offering conservatives an alternative to career politicians.
We continue to defy the media and professional politickers as our momentum grows. After the debate Tuesday, WJTV held an online poll showing us winning the debate.

---
|
---
| But we are approaching a critical time of our campaign with only 11 days left.
Tomorrow is an IMPORTANT finance deadline for our fundraising campaign as we move into the last week before election day.
Would you help out by jumping on our website and donating before tomorrow's deadline?[ $10, $20, or whatever you can afford will help us reach our goal before next Tuesday's deadline. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UYMLuKqwe8Do0UtUgNQNh2lXQLdXsjvf8PMRKBqQYgd-F0ziaNtRpD-FWJExUIPdkef1CAvcJGLdxgQg5HjaHE7O43CxdGnbkaArQqJBlcjnvhX-RAiZ2gAaIu3wJEv82W4PGFUkKYVy_2MHaJUxFAcbz13FSIGidFawQVmYF6CA1UHiaTx3prwrsMJLD3NOPm6UFlGuGYNIO92kGGBPw8mLbdUERHeV&c=IQYJPywjyDQfGqQwkbgpF6hJWN8QtUz9wvS2aJ2eJzmHpKr36_ZpaQ==&ch=D9oSnZDtIAaJNUe-e31cedJuhVXFOVEg_3jSqZHDGFJxesYNCBmLvQ==)
Heather and I are so grateful and encouraged by the amount of support we have received since we announced. And it's hard to ask for more support, but we are counting on people like you to help us win.
We truly are running a "We The People" campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| |
---

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: We want to make sure your impeachment signature is recorded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| _**[Join Ed and sign the petition to call on the House of Representatives to begin impeachment proceedings immediately against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb5/693b8b0a/4735acf4/72de85eb/3243032482/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-072619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_
Hello - Ed Markey is calling on the House to begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump, and we need to show massive grassroots support for holding Donald Trump accountable.

Since Ed called for impeaching President Trump yesterday, thousands of supporters have signed on to our petition urging the House to take immediate action. We want to make sure your signature is recorded.

_**[Click here to sign on and call on the House of Representatives to begin impeachment proceedings immediately.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb5/693b8b0a/4735acf4/72de85eb/3243032482/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-072619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
Hello,

Yesterday, the American people heard directly from Special Counsel Robert Mueller.

And what they heard was the undeniable truth that Russia interfered in our 2016 presidential election, and that President Trump obstructed the investigation into this serious attack.

The Trump campaign welcomed Russian interference, accepted it, lied about it, and used it to their benefit.

And contrary to President Trump's claim, the Special Counsel's report does not exonerate him of obstruction of justice.

Because of the Special Counsel's testimony yesterday and the weeks of continued obstruction from the Trump administration into Congress' investigation, the House of Representatives must begin formal impeachment proceedings against President Trump.

_**[We must stand up for the survival of our democracy. Join me and add your name to call for immediate impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb5/693b8b0a/4735acf4/72de85eb/3243032482/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-072619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

I do not come to this decision lightly, but when the facts undeniably demonstrate that the president obstructed justice and is continuing to do so, Congress must act on its constitutional duty.

_**[Sign my petition and urge the House of Representatives to exercise its authority and begin impeachment proceedings immediately against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb5/693b8b0a/4735acf4/72de85ea/3243032482/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-072619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Thank you,

Ed

**[ADD YOUR NAME](ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-072619_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=)**
---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

name: Kamala 2020
subject: Our progress so far:
body:
This week we launched our ambitious fundraising goal before next week’s
debate. We need to raise $500,000 before Kamala steps on that stage --
here’s our progress so far:

We’re pushing hard to reach this critical goal and keep our campaign’s
momentum to an all-time high, but we’re nowhere near reaching our target
-- not even close. Will you chip in a
donation to help before next Wednesday’s deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

name: Democratic Debate Update via Ryan HQ
subject: just days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
We must make every minute count between now and the second debate. It's our last guaranteed opportunity for Tim to get his message out to a national audience of millions.

Rush a contribution to Tim's debate prep fund today to make a huge difference in the outcome of the debate: **[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/keepupthefight](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomkeepupthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2")**

**Begin Forwarded Message:**
> Folks, I'm running for president to bring Ohio's spirit of resiliency to the White House.
>
> The second debate is just days away now and I have to prove that our movement has the support to stay in this race -- that means showing that thousands of grassroots donors stand behind me and my plan to rebuild our country.
>
> [**I 'm not asking you to commit to voting for me (not yet at least) -- but if you like what you hear will you contribute right now to grow our movement?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+not+asking+you+to+commit+to+voti&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2")
>
> Every day the stakes get higher. For working families struggling to pay bills, to seniors unable to afford essential health care, to our kids who are facing a world worse than what we were left. This movement is for them and our moment is now.
>
> Here's a link to give and have it counted right away so I can walk on to the debate stage knowing that you stand with me: **[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/keepupthefight](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomkeepupthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_1_1_T2")**
>
> Thank you --
>
> Tim
>

|

name: Abigail (personal)
subject: Peter, have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

I'm writing today to ask if you would be willing to make a contribution to my re-election campaign.

But before I ask for your help raising the last [**$12,202 we need to hit our July fundraising goal,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/0hntPJGhG98dvfpf_nJ8JjhxULaTd9grSHSNdzuWjn0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190726-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) I'd like to fill you in on just how far we've come.

We don't have to look too far back to remember how it felt to have a representative who was afraid to meet constituents and refused to be accountable to voters.

And it wasn't that long ago that our district's representative was more committed to dismantling our healthcare system and blocking common sense gun violence prevention measures than he was to creating a more equitable economy.

A representative who was more passionate about rejecting the science of climate change than taking responsible steps toward protecting our shared environment.

As you already know, we've come a long way in a short time.

Since taking office, my team and I have worked to restore integrity to this role and redirect the privileges of this office away from rigid ideology and toward building a more cooperative, more compassionate approach to public service. I've been working hard to represent the people of our district, and that means, first and foremost, writing, championing and passing legislation that addresses the problems facing our country and our citizens. With my freshmen colleagues in Congress, we're proving people can, should, and must expect more from their representatives.

But you also know that we didn't build a grassroots effort that won what the pundits called "unwinnable" overnight. It took months of building budgets, connecting with constituents, making calls, knocking doors, holding events, and hitting **daily** , **weekly** , and **monthly** **fundraising goals** to cross the finish line victorious. In a few days, we close the books on another one of these fundraising goals, but Peter, we still have to make progress towards our July 31st goal.
[**To be exact, we 're working to raise $12,202 by the end of the month -- which is why I'm coming to you now. Will you consider making a donation so we can reach our July target and pass another milestone together?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/0hntPJGhG98dvfpf_nJ8JjhxULaTd9grSHSNdzuWjn0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190726-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/0hntPJGhG98dvfpf_nJ8JjhxULaTd9grSHSNdzuWjn0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190726-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
I'm incredibly grateful to have a grassroots team that steps up when it counts. With your help, I'm confident this will be another one of those times.

Thank you for everything,
_\-- Abigail_

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/Q54w26nZZMScBQD9525tIgnrkl1lEZA9W1H2arPPW5M=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/TFBxXaSoIOosV2CISTza6xzvhH-Xe5PTzprC_UiDkYs=). If you wish to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/oQOTYTZ2w9pqFqxzMCwnpvBA5Aou0DmKSwAc4B5IRYI=). If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/YwKmjWM9VAnroA5-W1r4DuC1BjPGEnG5LBKrwFSsqSQ=/6L9T5LVM9eHrvEIcnfCuAjJ4a3UTBSw6e-dHOKU8rBw=). name: Team Tomlinson
subject: A plan for legalization that doesn’t leave anyone behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

In the United States today, 33 states have legalized marijuana in some form. Yet absurdly, at the federal level marijuana is treated as a Schedule I substance on par with heroin. One of the biggest cheerleaders of our backward federal marijuana policy is Georgia’s own senator, David Perdue.

If you agree it’s time for us to remove marijuana from the Controlled Substances Act schedule, make a $4.20 donation right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072619a&noskip=true]

Not only is Perdue opposed to ending marijuana prohibition at the federal level, he’s also against:

-Access to banking for marijuana businesses;
-Allowing VA doctors to recommend medical marijuana;
-Allowing states to legalize recreational marijuana.

Perdue is just not in step with what Georgians want: 77 percent support medical uses for marijuana, and 50 percent support recreational marijuana use – and that support grows every day as people learn more about the healthcare and economic benefits of bringing marijuana off the black market.

Teresa will fight not only to decriminalize, legalize, and regulate marijuana, she will also fight to expunge and commute sentences to address decades of racial disparities in our criminal justice system.

With legalization, it’s our responsibility to ensure that the communities that have suffered the most under federal policy – black and brown people – aren’t left behind. That’s why Teresa will help facilitate startup capital sources and other funding needed to ensure black and brown communities can participate in this new economic sector.

Will you chip in $4.20 today? Teresa doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, so your donation is what gives us the resources to advertise, hire new staff, and talk to voters about legalization and many more issues. Please make a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072619a&noskip=true]

Your contributions make it possible for Teresa to lead the way for criminal justice reform in our communities. Thank you.

–Team Tomlinson

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072619a&noskip=true]

Perdue is just not in step with what Georgians want: 77 percent support medical uses for marijuana, and 50 percent support recreational marijuana use – and that support grows every day as people learn more about the healthcare and economic benefits of bringing marijuana off the black market. Teresa will fight not only to decriminalize, legalize, and regulate marijuana, she will also fight to expunge and commute sentences to address decades of racial disparities in our criminal justice system. With legalization, it’s our responsibility to ensure that the communities that have suffered the most under federal policy – black and brown people – aren’t left behind. That’s why Teresa will help facilitate startup capital sources and other funding needed to ensure black and brown communities can participate in this new economic sector. Will you chip in $4.20 today? Teresa doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, so your donation is what gives us the resources to advertise, hire new staff, and talk to voters about legalization and many more issues. Please make a donation today. [] Your contributions make it possible for Teresa to lead the way for criminal justice reform in our communities. Thank you. –Team Tomlinson DONATE [] <<View this email in your browser.>> [] PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can click here [] . If you would like to unsubscribe, click here [] . Thanks for your support!

name: John Begala
subject: We're going to flip the legislature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Virginia Democrats have a record of fighting for you.
| | | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21cf/39260142/42d9385e/62639ee4/166334906/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Here at The Way Ahead, we're excited because we know Democrats have a great chance to flip both the House of Delegates and Senate blue this November. If we can do that, we know we'll be able to pass an agenda that creats a Virginia that works for everyone, no matter who you are or where you live. Our future is brightest if _every_ Virginian is part of our success. Virginia Democrats have a record of fighting for you. We've expanded Medicaid for approximately 400,000 hard-working Virginians. We've increased teacher pay and made investments in our public schools. And we've fought against discrimination to make sure Virginia is welcoming to all. And to think, there's so much more work to be done. That's why The Way Ahead PAC is committed to securing a Democratic majority in the General Assembly this November. **[A contribution of $10, $25, $50 or an amount of your choice will help us secure a Democratic majority this year.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21cf/39260142/42d9385e/62639ee7/166334906/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019#")** We are so excited to get to work for you and turn our vision for the Commonwealth into a realiy. Let's bring this one home for Virginians! Best, John Begala Political Director, The Way Ahead

name: MSNBC UPDATE via info@michaelbennet.com
subject: Last night on Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad06/134673f2/f53052c/699695dc/4073722085/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072619_MADDOW_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Last night on Rachel Maddow's show, Michael demanded that we take action to safeguard our elections from foreign interference.

**Here are the facts:**

Former Special Counsel Robert Mueller and U.S. intelligence agencies have made it clear Russia is gearing up to interfere in the 2020 election.

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell continue to block commonsense security protections to prevent Russia and other foreign nations from hacking our elections.

Mitch McConnell has blocked EIGHT votes on the Senate floor to pass measures protecting our elections.

[Michael is running for president to protect our elections from foreign interference and break up the tyranny of the Freedom Caucus - will you join the fight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad06/134673f2/f53052c/699695dc/4073722085/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_072619_MADDOW_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Climate-News@314action.org
subject: BREAKING: CNN moves to host a climate crisis themed town hall for Presidential candidates (!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
---
| | Two-thirds of Democrats and Independents support a Democratic debate on climate change. Hundreds of thousands of you have demonstrated your support for one -- And we're one step closer to getting there. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Two-thirds of Democrats and Independents support a Democratic debate on climate change.** Hundreds of thousands of you have demonstrated your support for one -- And we're one step closer to getting there. [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f0e/1794497523/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1") We need more than one media outlet to host a townhall, though. We need the Democratic National Committee to **lift the ban** it has in place on non-DNC sponsored debates or host one itself. This is a national call to action:**[Help us gather 100,000 signatures over the weekend if YOU want to see a Democratic debate on climate change this year >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f0d/1794497523/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-++Help+us+gather+100000+signatures+over+t&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")** | | | [Call for a debate >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f0c/1794497523/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Call+for+a+debate+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")
---
**It is beyond absurd that the DNC is willing to punish Presidential candidates for participating in a debate on climate change.**
We need more than one selective town hall on this existential issue where only a couple of hand-picked candidates are allowed to weigh in.
We need an official debate so EVERY Presidential candidate has the opportunity to put forth their plans, go into detail about them **(and be given more than just 30 seconds)** , and explain why their plan of action is what our country needs.
CNN is getting us one step closer -- **[Now is the time to strike while the iron is hot and the DNC is watching very closely to DEMAND a debate.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f0b/1794497523/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Now+is+the+time+to+strike+while+the+iron&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")**
| | [Call for a debate >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f0a/1794497523/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Call+for+a+debate+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")
---
Thank you,
314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f09/1794497523/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")
---
| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f08/1794497523/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f17/1794497523/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f16/1794497523/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46bf/4bd7760e/48ce920f/77e70f15/1794497523/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190726_DemClimateDebate_U3_X1")

name: Roger Lau
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This is exciting proof of the momentum that we see on the ground across the country. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ea86/45c30650/1445a8e48/669eba6f/3382033352/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Do you have a minute? I want to share some incredible news.

**We just passed our one-millionth donation to this campaign -- it came from Caitlyn, an ESL teacher from Tennessee.**

That's one million donations solely from grassroots donors.

That means zero from closed-door fundraising events. Zero from Washington lobbyists. Zero from corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

This is a 100% people-powered campaign -- and we hope that you'll join the grassroots donors who are building it.

**This is exciting proof of the momentum that we see on the ground across the country. Powerful special interests and other campaigns are watching to see how ready we are to fight for big, structural change. And by hitting this first milestone, you're helping to show them that change is coming sooner than they think.**

**[But we can't stop there. We have to keep this up and hit the next million. Will you contribute for the first time and join this fight for big, structural change in our country?
](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ea86/45c30650/1445a8e48/669eba6e/3382033352/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcyNmVtMS1mdWxsLWEifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190726em1-full-a")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Booker HQ
subject: Double your impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, A few days ago, we asked some of our campaign's founding donors to chip in to match folks making their first donations today. Since then, 939 donors have stepped up. This means that the first 12,636 people who make their first donation of $1 today will have their gift matched. One of those could be you! [**Will you chip in $1 right now to have your donation doubled?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190726_BHQ_20190726-fr-BHQ-finalpush130kkicker-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1") Here's why we're asking -- the DNC requires each candidate to have 130,000 individual donations to qualify for the fall debates. That's no easy task. We know that Joe Biden, Andrew Yang, Pete Buttigieg, Julian Castro, Kamala Harris, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Beto O'Rourke have already met the donor threshold. It's time we add Cory Booker to the list. But there's good news -- _we 're less than 5,000 donors away from hitting the 130,000 donor threshold, too! _With your help, Cory will be right up there with them. So team, can he count on your support? [**Every dollar you donate today could be doubled. Can you chip in $1 to help us close the gap and reach 130,000 donors?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190726_BHQ_20190726-fr-BHQ-finalpush130kkicker-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1") We can't do it without you,
Booker HQ
**[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190726_BHQ_20190726-fr-BHQ-finalpush130kkicker-ndnr_ndnr_contribbuton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** **

| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: YES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Whether or not we rise or fall all comes down to how each person chooses to answer the question.
#
Every successful grassroots movement this country has ever known has all started with one simple word. **Yes.**
Whether or not Beto rises or falls in this race all comes down to that word too. How many people will choose to say “yes” to being part of this movement?
* Yes to volunteering in Englewood.
* Yes to seeing Beto at a town hall meeting.
* Yes to tuning into a debate with your neighbors at a watch party.
* Yes to talking to friends and family about this campaign.
* And yes to clicking that contribute button.

**The more people that say yes, the higher this campaign climbs.** So today I am asking you the question. I know we won’t get everyone to say yes. But the more of you who do, the more of you who throw yourselves into making this a success, the more likely it becomes that we can win.
[Will you say yes to making a $3 donation to Beto today? If everyone reading this note says yes, we’ll be able to build the strongest grassroots campaign in the race. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20717?refcode=ema20190726-45089&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=45089%2E444211%2EEhfrin)
**[Yes! I'll chip in $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20717?refcode=ema20190726-45089&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=45089%2E444211%2EEhfrin)**
It doesn’t get said often enough how important momentum is in building a successful grassroots campaign. One person saying yes to getting involved can lead to another. Two people believing can lead to four or five people believing. Soon enough, you’ve caught fire.
Today, I’m asking you to say, “yes.” I’m asking you to believe that we can do this together. [I’m asking you to be that first spark by making a $3 donation.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20717?refcode=ema20190726-45089&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=45089%2E444211%2EEhfrin)
So it all comes down to what you say in response to this... are you in?
Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=45089%2E444211%2EEhfrin). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: What Mueller Was Trying to Hide
body:
"Special counsel Robert Mueller testified before two House committees Wednesday, and his performance requires us to look at..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45224e6848&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **What Mueller Was Trying to Hide**

“Special counsel Robert Mueller testified before two House committees Wednesday, and his performance requires us to look at his investigation and report in a new light,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _The Wall Street Journal._

“We’ve been told it was solely about Russian electoral interference and obstruction of justice. It’s now clear it was equally about protecting the actual miscreants behind the Russia-collusion hoax. The most notable aspect of the Mueller report was always what it omitted: the origins of this mess.”

What were those origins? “Christopher Steele’s dossier was central to the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s probe . . . The report ignored Mr. Steele’s paymaster, Fusion GPS, and its own ties to Russians. It also ignored Fusion’s paymaster, the Clinton campaign, and the ugly politics behind the dossier hit job.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5970827dad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Nine times during Wednesday’s hearing, Robert Mueller answered that something was not in his “purview” to investigate. And each time, it was “in response to questions about the origin story of the FBI counterintelligence operation against the Trump campaign,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd69087d15&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Americans need to know how and why a U.S. intelligence and law-enforcement agency came to spy on a presidential campaign . . . The good news is that [Attorney General] Barr does seem determined to find the truth.”
---
|
---
| “Johnny Brummit, an Orlando teen raised by his grandmother and, at times, the juvenile-justice system, took a microphone at the White House on Thursday afternoon to tell President Donald Trump and a room full of administration officials about how a nonprofit job-training program has changed his life,” Kate Santich reports for the [_Orlando Sentinel_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ec7a75808&e=3ee4985eea). “Brummit’s remarks were part of a one-year anniversary celebration of the Pledge to America’s Workers, a Trump administration initiative to encourage companies to provide education and training for workers of all ages.”
---
|
---
| “Owing much to President Donald Trump’s stewardship, the U.S. economy is about the strongest it has ever been,” writes John Mitchell, CEO of global trade association IPC, for [_Morning Consult_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c54407242&e=3ee4985eea). “What more could a president do with such strong economic performance? The answer by the Trump administration has been to revitalize the private sector’s commitment to the American worker.”

**More:** [Fox News Poll: Trump approval up, voter ratings on economy best in decades](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c147c6bb25&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| To maintain the integrity of America’s food stamp program, the Trump Administration is fixing “a loophole that has ballooned the pool of SNAP recipients in some states, to include millionaires who could receive assistance when they clearly don’t need it,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=825ba2aa86&e=3ee4985eea). “The American people expect their government to be fair, efficient, and to have integrity – just as they do in their own homes, businesses, and communities. That is why we are changing the rules.”
---
|

clean_body: "Special counsel Robert Mueller testified before two House committees Wednesday, and his performance requires us to look at..." | | | | | | | What Mueller Was Trying to Hide “Special counsel Robert Mueller testified before two House committees Wednesday, and his performance requires us to look at his investigation and report in a new light,” Kimberly Strassel writes in The Wall Street Journal. “We’ve been told it was solely about Russian electoral interference and obstruction of justice. It’s now clear it was equally about protecting the actual miscreants behind the Russia-collusion hoax. The most notable aspect of the Mueller report was always what it omitted: the origins of this mess.” What were those origins? “Christopher Steele’s dossier was central to the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s probe . . . The report ignored Mr. Steele’s paymaster, Fusion GPS, and its own ties to Russians. It also ignored Fusion’s paymaster, the Clinton campaign, and the ugly politics behind the dossier hit job.” | | Nine times during Wednesday’s hearing, Robert Mueller answered that something was not in his “purview” to investigate. And each time, it was “in response to questions about the origin story of the FBI counterintelligence operation against the Trump campaign,” editorial board writes. “Americans need to know how and why a U.S. intelligence and law-enforcement agency came to spy on a presidential campaign . . . The good news is that [Attorney General] Barr does seem determined to find the truth.” | | “Johnny Brummit, an Orlando teen raised by his grandmother and, at times, the juvenile-justice system, took a microphone at the White House on Thursday afternoon to tell President Donald Trump and a room full of administration officials about how a nonprofit job-training program has changed his life,” Kate Santich reports for the . “Brummit’s remarks were part of a one-year anniversary celebration of the Pledge to America’s Workers, a Trump administration initiative to encourage companies to provide education and training for workers of all ages.” | | “Owing much to President Donald Trump’s stewardship, the U.S. economy is about the strongest it has ever been,” writes John Mitchell, CEO of global trade association IPC, for . “What more could a president do with such strong economic performance? The answer by the Trump administration has been to revitalize the private sector’s commitment to the American worker.” More: | | To maintain the integrity of America’s food stamp program, the Trump Administration is fixing “a loophole that has ballooned the pool of SNAP recipients in some states, to include millionaires who could receive assistance when they clearly don’t need it,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in . “The American people expect their government to be fair, efficient, and to have integrity – just as they do in their own homes, businesses, and communities. That is why we are changing the rules.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Andrea
subject: proud of Tim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friend,

I'm proud of everything Tim is doing in this campaign -- and not just because he's my husband!

Tim has hit the ground running -- literally. He's traveling from state to state, listening to the kitchen table concerns of hardworking Americans, many of whom are struggling with the stress and anxiety of making ends meet.

Tim is making his campaign about fighting for the working class: something he's done his whole life here in Youngstown.

**Friend, when Tim walks on to the debate stage in Detroit next Tuesday, he 'll be there for the millions of Americans who deal with the constant creditors calling, struggle to make their rent and think twice about filling a prescription. [That's why it's essential we keep this campaign moving. Will you donate immediately to help?](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+itrsquos+essential+we+kee&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2")**

Like the last debate, Tim will share the stage with nine other candidates.

There will be major national attention focused on this debate, as millions of Americans, political pundits, and the media look for a breakthrough moment to begin clearing the crowded field of candidates.

**Tim is the candidate to beat Donald Trump. And, with your continuing support, Tim is ready to take him on.**

I also know how much Tim appreciates the support of friends like you powering this campaign. [**Will you chip in right now to let him know you have his back as he prepares to debate next Tuesday? >>**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+right+now+to+let+him+kn&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190726_2_2_T2")

Andrea

name: John Heenan
subject: Why I'm supporting Wilmot Collins for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
John Heenan here. I ran for Congress last year because I believe Montanans deserve leaders who will be honest with them, fight for them, and do their best to represent their values in Washington, D.C.
I'm endorsing Wilmot Collins for Senate because I know that he will be a Senator for Montanans--not a lackey for this President, Mitch McConnell, and corporate special interests.
[**Watch my endorsement video now --then chip in $5 to Wilmot's campaign.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190726&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190726&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My work as a consumer protection lawyer has shown me that there are two sets of rules: one for the rich and powerful, and one for everyone else. In the Senate, I know that Wilmot will work to level the playing field and bring the voices of hardworking Montanans to the halls of power.
Our current Senator--Steve Daines--doesn't represent our values or our families. He's too busy doing the bidding of Mitch McConnell and corporate lobbyists. Montanans deserve better.
The stakes couldn't be higher, which is why I'm off the sidelines and all in for Wilmot. I'm asking you to please join me!
**[Check out my endorsement video, then contribute $5 to Wilmot Collins now.](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190726&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
John Heenan
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190726&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

body:

Team,
You know that Maggie Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes -- **Kelly Ayotte almost won.**
Now, Mitch McConnell and corporate special interests are going to make unseating Senator Hassan a top priority. That's why we're so focused on every single one of our fundraising goals. Yes, even July's.

Governor Weld was one of ten presidential candidates, and the sole Republican to speak. Bill Weld does”** Ten Democratic presidential hopefuls took the stage Wednesday at the NAACP’s candidate forum in Detroit looking to separate themselves from the pack in a crowded field – and among a key constituency, African Americans. But those in attendance said that while some of the candidates were impressive, they did little – if anything – to sway those who already were leaning towards a particular candidate, or to convince the voters who haven’t decided who among the two dozen announced candidates they will vote for in 2020. But several were surprised by the only Republican presidential candidate to take part in the forum, former Massachusetts Gov. Bill Weld. I’ll make this quick: our fundraising team just sent me our latest projections, and we’re not on pace to hit our $500,000 grassroots fundraising goal before I take the stage during next week’s debate. subject: the work that we do isn't glamorous, and you won't hear anything about it on corporate-controlled media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
South Carolina is one of the most important early states in the 2020 primary
#
Too many political organizations focus exclusively on Washington and neglect to build the grassroots power necessary to effectively challenge big money's stranglehold of our political process.

That's part of why I'm so proud of my work with Our Revolution South Carolina -- we are doing the hard but necessary organizing that is critical to restoring a democracy of the people in the United States of America.

[_**South Carolina is one of the most important early states in the 2020 primary, and we need your help to ensure that our organization is as strong as possible to both succeed in the primary and continue to build a long-term foundation for success. Can I count on you to donate now to create sustainable grassroots power in South Carolina?**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+South+Carolina+is+one+of+the+most+import&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1")

[DONATE $50 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+50+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1")

[DONATE $100 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+100+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1")
A lot of the work that we do isn't glamorous, and you won't hear anything about it on corporate-controlled media. Here's the thing: that's by design. The powers that be don't want us to focus on organizing or issues like Medicare for All. They don't want us to take over the Democratic party by winning local and party level elections up and down the ballot.

Unfortunately for them, that's precisely why we remain laser-focused on all of those things. The political revolution is impossible without building progressive power. That's why we are doing the critical on-the-ground organizing work in South Carolina, and it's why we need your help to expand our footprint.

[**_Rush a donation now to ensure that Our Revolution has the resources to continue to expand our political revolution until we restore a democracy of the people in America._**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+Rush+a+donation+now+to+ensure+that+Our+R&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_30DO_190726_1_1")

In solidarity,

Lucero Mesa

---
>
**But even though the pressure is high, you won't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors.**

You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.

**Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help.**

Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful.

We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face.

To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas.

That's what we're focused on.

So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people.

Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you.

**[So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time? Help hit our July fundraising goal so we can continue to grow this movement the right way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852eaba/45c30650/145bae8cc/669eaa40/2116754997/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcyNWVtMy12MS1mdWxsLWIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190725em3-v1-full-b")**

clean_body: Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement and increase the number of states we're organizing in. | | | "" We only have a few days left to hit our July fundraising goal -- and as of this afternoon, we're still behind where we need to be. This is important. Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, increase the number of states we're organizing in, and share the big ideas to get our country working for working people again. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" But even though the pressure is high, you won't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors. You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her. Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help. Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful. We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy. Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face. To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas. That's what we're focused on. So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people. Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you. "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

#
**In 2018, Stacey Abrams raised over ****$30 MILLION with the help of ****George Soros, Tom Steyer, and Michael Bloomberg. Now, she has raised at least another $4 million this year. **That's more than ANY other political organization in Georgia.

We were already up against a grassroots fundraising deadline at the end of this month. **The news that Stacey Abrams and her political machine is still raising and spending millions on their ground game makes this even more critical. **

[**Can you pitch in to help us hit our goal right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7b76d2a65f&e=02cd889ad3)

**Stacey Abrams may not be running in 2020, but she’s still out there. **She still has the support of radical liberal donors, the attention of the national liberal media, and a political machine doing everything it can to defeat me and turn Georgia into California.

[**Grassroots supporters like you stopped Stacey Abrams in 2018. Will you help us stop her again right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=adf4310bbd&e=02cd889ad3)

**No matter who the Democrat candidate is in 2020, they will be pushing these radical socialist policies here in Georgia. **

Stacey Abrams has built a political machine funded by radical donors and labor unions. We’re building the strongest grassroots team in Georgia history to stop her once and for all, but we can't do this without your help.

[**Pitch in today and help us hit this month's fundraising goal. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=81d1350f12&e=02cd889ad3)

David

name: Shepard Nevel, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Hear what John has to say on cybersecurity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
John is thinking even more deeply and ambitiously about this issue than most. Permanently securing our elections from the kind of interference we saw in 2016 MUST become a national priority. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771720/691c9bd/6ec0a5bd/11a45ad5/1972999198/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--a lot of people are still talking about Robert Mueller's testimony. And it's true that his answers shed light on extremely serious, ongoing threats to our democracy.

But John is committed to doing more. Permanently securing our elections from the kind of interference we saw in 2016 must become a national priority.

[**_Learn more now by reading John 's op-ed on the essential steps we need to take to improve our nation's cybersecurity._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771720/691c9bd/6ec0a5bd/11a45ad2/1972999198/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.nbcnews.com/think/opinion/mueller-s-testimony-was-warning-america-ignores-russia-s-ongoing-ncna1034636")

As Governor, John wasted no time opening the National Cybersecurity Center in Colorado Springs to respond to cyber threats in his home state. As President, he'll unite our national security and intelligence agencies to bring a similar rigor--across local, state, and federal levels--to handling threats to our election integrity, businesses, and critical infrastructure systems in the future.

[**_Once you 've read John's thoughts, chip in to help bring these plans closer to reality._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA Friend,
**On July 31st at 11:59 pm, our Official Team Pence End of Month Fundraising Deadline hits.**
_It is crucial to ensure that we raise as many funds as possible from the conservative grassroots before then, and I’d like to tell you why._
We cannot afford this radical agenda being pushed by Democrats in Washington. Today’s Democratic Party has drifted further to the left than I can ever recall, and it is absolutely crucial that the Sixth District hold the line against the type of radical nonsense we are seeing out of the Swamp today.
_I support our military men and women in uniform serving at home and abroad. I am fighting to create jobs and continue growing our historically strong economy alongside President Trump. I support the rule of law, our brave ICE agents, and am working to ensure we finally end the dangerous flow of mass illegal immigration and secure our borders once and for all. _
**But the radical left in Washington is actively working against all of these things.**
**[I know the Sixth District, and I know the type of representation you demand in Washington. That’s why I’m coming to you today during this crucial end of month fundraising period. Friend, On July 31st at 11:59 pm, our Official Team Pence End of Month Fundraising Deadline hits. It is crucial to ensure that we raise as many funds as possible from the conservative grassroots before then, and I’d like to tell you why. We cannot afford this radical agenda being pushed by Democrats in Washington. Today’s Democratic Party has drifted further to the left than I can ever recall, and it is absolutely crucial that the Sixth District hold the line against the type of radical nonsense we are seeing out of the Swamp today. I support our military men and women in uniform serving at home and abroad. I am fighting to create jobs and continue growing our historically strong economy alongside President Trump. I support the rule of law, our brave ICE agents, and am working to ensure we finally end the dangerous flow of mass illegal immigration and secure our borders once and for all. name: Bruce Sinclair
subject: Trump's takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We just got some disturbing news about the Trump Campaign's efforts to target Virginia. As you read this, the Trump campaign is deploying its operatives across the Commonwealth as part of the "Trump V
|

| | Derek,

We just got some disturbing news about the Trump Campaign's efforts to target Virginia. As you read this, **the Trump campaign is deploying its operatives across the Commonwealth as part of the "Trump Victory Initiative."** Their goal is simple: develop a grassroots organization that can beat Mark Warner and re-elect Donald Trump in 2020.

I'll be frank with you, Derek. This is a game-changer, and it means we need to step up our efforts right now. If we don't, we're going to have a tough time building the grassroots campaign we'll need to re-elect Mark and beat Donald Trump in 2020.

That's why I'm asking you to make an emergency contribution before our end-of-month deadline. **This is our first fundraising deadline since Mark's opponent announced his candidacy, and we cannot afford to fall short of our 1,000 new donor goal. Will you chip in today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1cd/53d9897e/514e32fc/1c8e78af/1720190138/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-trumpva?refcode=20190726nd__152__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** As Mark's campaign manager, it's my job to make sure we have the best possible team deployed across Virginia so we can turn out voters, re-elect Mark, and keep Virginia blue. We've got a plan to make it happen, but unfortunately, it all hinges on meeting our fundraising goals. If we start falling short, we'll have to scale back our efforts. It's that simple.

That's why I'm personally asking for your help right now. [**Please give what you can today to help Mark win.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1cd/53d9897e/514e32fc/1c8e78ae/1720190138/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-trumpva?refcode=20190726nd__152__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Bruce Sinclair

| | You _know_ what's at stake. You know what happens if we _take back_ the U.S. Senate from Mitch McConnell and his obstructionist team. [**That's why I'm asking for your support right now.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2df3d/6cd27893/4f91faaa/1580bd0d/1506598710/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-07-26-eom1&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
* We can and must close Donald Trump's children's prisons, end family separations, and end the cruelty of Trump's immigration agenda.

* We can and must overcome science deniers and fight climate chaos with everything we have.

* We can and must protect health care for the sick and vulnerable, because Trump, McConnell, and Republicans will keep trying to take it away.

I can go on and on. Moving forward on literally every progressive agenda item starts with taking back the Senate. **That's why Republicans are looking to Oregon, to defeating me in 2020.** I know you won't let that happen.
