name: Gary Peters
subject: what we have at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Friends: Winning back control of the Senate is just as important as ousting Donald Trump from the White House.
Trust me, I've watched Mitch McConnell block everything from health care to voting rights - all the while moving the Supreme Court to the extreme right by confirming Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch. Progress hinges on Democrats winning back a Senate majority.
Democrats _can _take back the Senate, but experts across the country - like Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, The New York Times and The Washington Post - all agree: **If I lose my race here in Michigan, Democrats won't be able to win the Senate majority.**
Health care, voting rights, Medicare, Social Security and the Supreme Court are all on the line. The only way to protect them is if we win in Michigan and Democrats flip the Senate blue.
This race could determine Senate control. That's why the GOP has already raised MILLIONS to beat me. Now, polling shows me leading by just one point, 44% to 43%, to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump's handpicked opponent.
[**We're 92% of the way to our midnight goal. So please, will you give $5 or more now to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daca3/5721a3ed/73e1cac0/efa44bf/3469327672/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyMi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiJnJlY3VycmluZz0xIn0=/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk22-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

body:

| | **BREAKING: SELF-FUNDING REPUBLICAN ENTERS CRITICAL SENATE RACE** This is a massive problem: A self-funding Republican just entered the race to defeat Ben Ray. Not only will he have Republicans' special interest cash -- he can spend unlimited amounts of his own money, too. We don't know how else to put this: **If we get outraised and lose Ben Ray 's Senate race, Democrats will have ZERO chance to win the Senate. ** It'll take 4,397 gifts before midnight to close this gap and keep our ads up defending Ben Ray. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50b/18e32a7f/57942f95/7bb6e7b4/3375035618/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50b/18e32a7f/57942f95/7bb6e7aa/3375035618/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

body:
| | | | | [Please read an important personal request Michael sent yesterday. It's attached below. This next week is crucial for our campaign as Michael heads into the second round of presidential debates and we face our end-of-month fundraising deadline. We're still falling short of the 130,000 donor threshold but if everyone reading this chips in, we'll reach that goal in no time.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954b/3484458706/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/Election-Security?source=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

| | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954a/3484458706/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

I'll be upfront: [I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954a/3484458706/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The next week is crucial to our campaign. On Wednesday, I'll be on stage at the next presidential debate, and on the same day, we're facing our end of month deadline.

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress.

Many people considered our campaign a long shot, and they said I had almost no chance of being in these debates. [With your support, we proved them all wrong.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954a/3484458706/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, so every step I take in this journey is because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954a/3484458706/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Today, I 'm counting on your support. We can't afford to fall short now that we've come so far. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters again ahead of these crucial deadlines? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad05/134673f2/f6d963b/6996954a/3484458706/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

clean_body: | | | | | "=" | | "" I'll be upfront: "" The next week is crucial to our campaign. On Wednesday, I'll be on stage at the next presidential debate, and on the same day, we're facing our end of month deadline. Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress. Many people considered our campaign a long shot, and they said I had almost no chance of being in these debates. "" I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, so every step I take in this journey is because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race. "" "" | "" Right now, I'm preparing for the next round of debates. I'm excited to share my ambitious plans to fix our broken politics, clean up government corruption, and strengthen our democracy. It all starts right here, with this campaign. I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us. "" "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for all you do. Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team Kamala
subject: BREAKING: Trump receives “extensive political briefing” on Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
This story is wild -- According to _Politico_ , Donald Trump and his top political advisers gathered at the White House on Thursday for an “extensive political briefing” on the biggest threats to Trump’s re-election. At the top of the list? **Kamala Harris**. Look, as soon as our campaign rose in the polls, we knew that the Republicans were going to take notice. But a 70-minute briefing at the White House with Trump, his advisors and Republicans leaders like Mitch McConnell is a serious escalation we cannot ignore. **Contribute to Kamala’s campaign right now. If everyone supporting our campaign chipped in a small amount today, we’d have enough resources to fight back against Trump, McConnell, and the Republicans operatives plotting to destroy our campaign.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190726-eom?refcode=ema190726-eom12-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5749_5755789_a0cCRw&akid=5749%2E5755789%2Ea0cCRw)

name: Rachel Thomas, Beto for America
subject: You're in the Write Place
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Hey, it’s Rachel from Beto for America! Welcome to your regular dose of
what’s happening across Team Beto - from what music Beto’s listening to on
the trail to how every single dollar contributed to this campaign is
helping create a grassroots movement across the country.

In each issue, we’ll run down where we’re going, what we’re building and
who we’re bringing into this campaign along the way. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/youre-write-place/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1001&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]You won’t want to
miss it - so sign up to get You’re in the Write Place delivered directly
to your inbox.

ROADRUNNER [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20489?t=1002&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

First things first. What’s Beto up to on the trail? In each issue we’ll
spotlight where Beto has been, what’s coming up and how you can plug into
campaign events in your community.

We often talk about how Beto’s policies are informed by the people he
meets every day in communities across America. This week Beto made his
seventh trip to Iowa, where he met a man named James who shared his story
about navigating a health care system out of reach for too many while also
fighting cancer.

It’s people like James and people in every state and community - those who
may have felt discounted, ignored or overlooked - that Beto believes in,
and that Beto will fight for as president.

Here’s where Beto will be in the coming weeks 👀

JULY Detroit, MI: 2020 Democratic Debate
30 [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/debate2-party-host/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1003&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Click here to host a debate watch party >>

AUG Las Vegas, NV: AFSCME 2020 Public Service Forum
3 [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20934?t=1004&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Livestream it here >>

AUG Beto Headlining:
17 Arkansas Democrats’ annual Clinton Dinner

RADIO, RADIO [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18831?t=1005&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

Ever wonder what Beto listens to on the road? Here are a few of his
favorites from the trail:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21005?t=1006&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

BLUEPRINT [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20490?t=1007&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

This campaign is powered by all of you. And we know that every single
contribution that comes into our campaign are your hard-earned dollars. So
we want to make sure you know where those dollars are going to build this
campaign.

In just the past few weeks, your contributions have allowed us to:

* Bring on four new senior members of our team leading the campaign’s
rapid response, research, political and data operations.
* Open 11(!) field offices in Iowa, 2 offices in South Carolina and a
volunteer office in El Paso
* Build a [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20935?t=1008&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]brand-new “Believe” page on our website, featuring
supporters sharing their own stories about why they’re on
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20491?t=1009&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]#TeamBeto.

Want to submit a video yourself? Just reply to this email and share a
selfie video about why you believe in this campaign and the movement we’re
building across the country.

Help us build more things:

If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution
will go through immediately.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20950?refcode=ema20190726-44736-el&t=1010&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]$5 [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21006?refcode=ema20190726-44736-el&t=1011&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]$25 [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20951?refcode=ema20190726-44736-other&t=1012&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Other amount

FAVORITE THING [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20772?t=1013&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

🚨BREAKING NEWS 🚨 Amy just joined Instagram! Find her at [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20936?t=1014&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]@amysorourke,
follow her, and check out her trip with Beto to New York and Michigan,
where Amy and Beto visited Ellis Island, went on [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20937?t=1015&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]The
View and [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20775?t=1016&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]cooked dinner with the Collins family in Flint who are still
living the impacts of the water crisis.

Don’t forget to catch the stories while you can!

This week, we also [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20776?t=1017&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]opened our El Paso Field Office, where supporters
and volunteers from Beto’s hometown can take action in the community and
bring more people into the campaign. The office will be supported by
volunteers like Diana, pictured here, who helped decorate the new office
and made calls to invite other supporters to the office opening event.
🎊This is the first campaign she's ever volunteered with 🎊and she's
involved because she deeply believes in Beto and his vision for the
country. I couldn’t have said it Beto myself, Diana!

And shoutout to our #TeamBeto all-stars who started their very own
fundraising challenge online. Want to get in on it? Click [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20777?t=1018&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]here,
retweet and tag four friends to join in.

REVOLUTION ROCK [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20778?t=1019&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

In each issue, we’ll feature a member of our team so you can get to know
the people working to build this grassroots movement alongside all of you.
We’ll ask them five questions about what they do at BFA, who they are and
where they can find the best tacos in El Paso (just kidding, that last one
is Tacos Don Cuco).

This week, we’re spotlighting Chrystian Woods, Beto for America’s National
Director of Outreach.

Q: What's your favorite part about the work you do at Beto for America

A: My favorite part of working for Beto for America is having the
opportunity to build the Outreach team. Before coming to El Paso, I saw a
graphic from a Beto supporter that read, “Go everywhere. Talk to everyone.
Leave no one behind.” Those words resonated with me and I am excited to
build a team that looks like America and reflects that mantra.

Q: Tell us about the first time you met Beto

A: I first met Beto at Ponce City Market when he came to Atlanta for the
IWillVote Gala. He was extremely nice and personable, but the first
thing I remember thinking was, “Wow, he is really tall” while staring up
at him. April Ryan and I have that in common.

Q: What's something surprising about living in El Paso?

A: The dry heat is not so bad. I can get used to it.

Q: Before BFA you were working in Georgia to elect Stacey Abrams as
governor. How did that experience inform your work at BFA?

A: The first similarity that comes to mind after working in Georgia for
the past 3+ years is that - like Texas - we had to convince people that we
were a battleground state and that we were worth investing in. But because
of what we did, the country and world has seen the potential in Georgia
and its 16 electoral votes - and because of Beto, we've seen the potential
in Texas and its 38 electoral votes. The second is that we literally
counted no one out and intentionally engaged left out and marginalized
communities. The third is that I met and worked with Jen O'Malley
Dillon and thought, this lady is a badass and I want to soak up as much
knowledge as I can. I’m happy to be working in a place and with a team
that allows me to do all three.

Q: Which food scene is better? Atlanta or El Paso?

A: I’ve had some tasty food in El Paso, but Atlanta reigns supreme. You
get a great mix of southern, cultural, and highbrow cuisines because of
the diversity and growth of the city. If you ever need ATL food
recommendations just let me know.

COMPLETE CONTROL [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20868?t=1020&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

Beto’s campaigns - from his City Council race to Congress and his historic
Senate run - have never been guided by polls. But that doesn’t mean this
newsletter can’t be! We want to know what you want to hear from us - and
how we can help you grow this grassroots campaign in your communities too.

First order of business is...🥁drum roll 🥁...what to call this newsletter!?
Choose your favorite option - or send us your own ideas!

TAKE THE POLL:

1. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/what-should-we-call-newsletter/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1021&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]YOU’RE IN THE WRITE PLACE
2. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/what-should-we-call-newsletter/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1022&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]THE SETLIST
3. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/what-should-we-call-newsletter/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1023&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]A NEW KIND OF NEWSLETTER
4. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/what-should-we-call-newsletter/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1024&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]WRITING NO ONE OFF
5. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/what-should-we-call-newsletter/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1025&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]OTHER: [WRITE IN]

SHOULD I STAY OR SHOULD I GO [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20869?t=1026&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ][IMG]

Is that even a question? [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/youre-write-place/?source=ema20190726-44736&t=1027&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Sign up to receive this newsletter regularly
and click here to share it on [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/20901?text=Check+out+the+very+first+%22You%27re+In+the+Write+Place%22+newsletter+from+%40TeamBeto%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fact.betoorourke.com%2Fmailings%2Fview%2F44736&t=1028&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Twitter or [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/564?u=https%3A%2F%2Fact.betoorourke.com%2Fmailings%2Fview%2F44736&t=1029&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5 ]Facebook.

See you soon!

Rachel
@rachel_r_thomas

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190726footer&t=1030&refcode2=44736_444211_BJHvK5&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1031&akid=44736%2E444211%2EBJHvK5

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Mary Ellen Smith
subject: We're making progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Yesterday, Fox News released a poll that shows Governor Hickenlooper polling at 2% - alongside Beto O'Rourke and Cory Booker. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b72/1594344868/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, Yesterday, [**Fox News released a poll that shows Governor Hickenlooper _polling at 2%_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b73/1594344868/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/fox-news-poll-biden-holds-commanding-lead-for-democratic-nomination")--alongside Beto O'Rourke and Cory Booker. Yes, there's a lot of work that still needs to get done. But our upswing in the polls is encouraging: **John 's message is reaching people.** His message of collaboration to get the big, bold, progressive ideas done resonates with the American people because it's what we, as a country, need. With your help, we can continue making progress in the polls and qualify for the Fall debates. John needs to be on the debate stage in September. Can you help us get him there? **[Chip in $5 today to help John stay in this race.](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b70/1594344868/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/130k2percent?refcode=190726bumper")** [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b70/1594344868/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/130k2percent?refcode=190726bumper")** ** Together, we can do this. M.E. Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Director
Hickenlooper 2020 \--------------------------
### **BREAKING: Hickenlooper campaign polling at 2%**
Big news friend, [**Fox News released a poll tonight with Governor Hickenlooper polling at 2%.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b73/1594344868/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/fox-news-poll-biden-holds-commanding-lead-for-democratic-nomination") _**This is huge.**_ We need to keep up the momentum. **[Chip in $5 right now.](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b71/1594344868/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/130k2percent?refcode=1090725")** [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b71/1594344868/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/130k2percent?refcode=1090725")** ** We've made it this far because of you. As we head into debate week, we need to keep the wind in our sails. We've worked hard to get to 2% in the polls and we can't stop now. With your support, we can win this thing. Giddy up, Team Hickenlooper
---

---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6e/1594344868/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6f/1594344868/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6c/1594344868/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6d/1594344868/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6a/1594344868/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771727/691c9bd/6ec4f17a/11a45b6b/1594344868/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

**A group of prominent South Carolina leaders - including the state political director for Joe Biden's presidential campaign in 2008 - just endorsed Tim for President.**

**[Click here to help us capitalize on this big news before the weekend!](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-sc-endorsements?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+help+us+capitalize+on+this&utm_campaign=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3&source=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3")** We're proud to announce our critical new endorsements from South Carolina!

**Two former Joe Biden 2008 campaign members: Brandon Brown, Joe Biden 's 2008 South Carolina political director, and Fletcher N. Smith, Jr., Biden's campaign co-chair are officially supporting Tim Ryan for president!**

These latest endorsements signal the building momentum and enthusiastic support for Tim in South Carolina. Across the country, Tim's message of transforming broken systems, especially economic stress is resonating with folks. Our supporters are putting their strength and commitment behind our campaign because they see Tim as the future of the Democratic Party.

They know Tim's plan to revitalize America and save the working and middle class is exactly what we need to move our country forward and beat Donald Trump in 2020.

[**Rush a donation to help us spread the news of these ground-breaking endorsements in South Carolina!**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-sc-endorsements?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Rush+a+donation+to+help+us+spread+the+ne&utm_campaign=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3&source=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3")

Millions of hardworking Americans will be watching Tim as he shares his vision and plan for America during the Democratic debate in Detroit. This is a pivotal moment for Tim, our campaign, and the future of America.

[**With so much at stake, friend, for South Carolina and the country we love, will you join Brandon Brown and Fletcher N. Smith, Jr. in supporting Tim right now?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-sc-endorsements?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3_T1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+With+so+much+at+stake+friend+for+South+C&utm_campaign=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3&source=TR_EM_RR_ACT_190726_3_3")

Thank you for your support.

Tim Ryan for America

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Republican results, Democrat dysfunction
body:
This week’s Mueller testimony was a complete disaster for Democrats. Following an exhaustive investigation and full access to the Trump team... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/republican-results-democrat-dysfunction?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Republican Results, Democrat Dysfunction_** This week’s Mueller testimony was a complete disaster for Democrats. Following an exhaustive investigation and full access to the Trump team, former Special Council Robert Mueller fully vindicated **President Donald Trump**. There was no collusion, and there was no obstruction of justice. And when Democrats called him in front of the House Intelligence Committee this week, we heard the same thing from Mueller – no collusion, no obstruction of justice. But what did we hear from Democrats? Well, they broadcast to the nation once again that they’re focused on politics, plain and simple. They’re more interested in political drama and grandstanding than results. We’ve seen the same thing with the long line of Democrats who have made their way to Indiana this week for the National Urban League convention. These Democrats are more interested in attacking **President Trump** than actually working to serve the American people. It definitely provides a clear contrast to the Indiana Way, and the results that Republicans are delivering both here at home and in Washington. As Republicans, we’re working on solutions, and are delivering record job commitments, record road funding, record education funding, passing balanced budgets and helping more Hoosiers seek high-demand, high-wage careers.

It’s a great time to be a Hoosier, and that’s thanks to Republican leadership. And thanks to Democrats, that contrast is crystal clear.

**PHOTO:** _This week, Chairman Hupfer met with Jerome Stanford of the Indiana-Kentucky-Ohio Regional Council of Carpenters to talk about how their training programs are helping skill-up Hoosiers for in-demand careers! Indiana’s carpenters are helping (literally) build Indiana!_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Governor Holcomb is Helping Deliver Record Job Commitments!_** **Governor Eric Holcomb** helped bring some great news to Indiana today! He joined local officials in Greenfield to cut the ribbon for another global automotive company that’s bringing hundreds of high-wage jobs to Indiana!

Thanks to Indiana’s world-class workforce and business climate, chassis supplier BWI has committed to creating 441 new, high-wage Hoosier jobs and investing more than $80 million into the state.

And, of course, this comes as **Governor Holcomb** ’s leadership has helped Indiana secure back-to-back years of record Hoosier job commitments across the entire state. It’s certainly a great time to be a Hoosier!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Get to Know Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel_** It’s a municipal election year in Indiana! Across the state, we have Republican elected officials who are working hard to deliver results for their communities, and one of them is **Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel**. He has been mayor of Columbia City for eight years and is ready to continue serving his community.

Learn more about **Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel:**

**Q: What are your biggest priorities for Columbia City if re-elected?**
A: I plan to continue to focus on improving the quality of life of our residents, attracting and retaining talent, investing in our citizens, and most importantly, growing our population.

**Q:** **How do you plan to get residents more involved in the decision-making process for your city?**
A: I plan to continue to provide clear communication and transparency during the decision-making process to Columbia City residents. I want to involve more younger residents and diversify the residents involved in our boards and commissions.

**Q: What is your favorite thing about Columbia City?**
A: My favorite thing is the kindness, generosity, and hospitality of our community. The people of my city never cease to amaze me when it comes to helping out their neighbors.

Make sure to stay up-to-date with Mayor Daniel and his campaign on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0746d62b60&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=326857c5cc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Applications Now Open: _**
_**Apply for the Lugar Series**_ Are you a woman interested in expanding your civic engagement? Are you looking for an opportunity to make an impact in your community and build your leadership skills? The Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series, now in its 30th year, was created for you!

Applications are now available for the 2019-2020 class. Learn more about the program [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9bc5ba720&e=1acd9bb3d6), and download the application [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e18e23bf72&e=1acd9bb3d6). Applications are due next Thursday, August 1.

| **_National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!_** Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dafaa85034&e=1acd9bb3d6), learn about sponsorship opportunities [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7a20260d81&e=1acd9bb3d6), and register to attend the national convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbce3d1e10&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

clean_body: This week’s Mueller testimony was a complete disaster for Democrats. Following an exhaustive investigation and full access to the Trump team... | | | | | | | | Republican Results, Democrat Dysfunction This week’s Mueller testimony was a complete disaster for Democrats. Following an exhaustive investigation and full access to the Trump team, former Special Council Robert Mueller fully vindicated President Donald Trump. There was no collusion, and there was no obstruction of justice. And when Democrats called him in front of the House Intelligence Committee this week, we heard the same thing from Mueller – no collusion, no obstruction of justice. But what did we hear from Democrats? Well, they broadcast to the nation once again that they’re focused on politics, plain and simple. They’re more interested in political drama and grandstanding than results. We’ve seen the same thing with the long line of Democrats who have made their way to Indiana this week for the National Urban League convention. These Democrats are more interested in attacking President Trump than actually working to serve the American people. It definitely provides a clear contrast to the Indiana Way, and the results that Republicans are delivering both here at home and in Washington. As Republicans, we’re working on solutions, and are delivering record job commitments, record road funding, record education funding, passing balanced budgets and helping more Hoosiers seek high-demand, high-wage careers. It’s a great time to be a Hoosier, and that’s thanks to Republican leadership. And thanks to Democrats, that contrast is crystal clear. PHOTO: This week, Chairman Hupfer met with Jerome Stanford of the Indiana-Kentucky-Ohio Regional Council of Carpenters to talk about how their training programs are helping skill-up Hoosiers for in-demand careers! Indiana’s carpenters are helping (literally) build Indiana! | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Governor Holcomb is Helping Deliver Record Job Commitments! Governor Eric Holcomb helped bring some great news to Indiana today! He joined local officials in Greenfield to cut the ribbon for another global automotive company that’s bringing hundreds of high-wage jobs to Indiana! Thanks to Indiana’s world-class workforce and business climate, chassis supplier BWI has committed to creating 441 new, high-wage Hoosier jobs and investing more than $80 million into the state. And, of course, this comes as Governor Holcomb ’s leadership has helped Indiana secure back-to-back years of record Hoosier job commitments across the entire state. It’s certainly a great time to be a Hoosier! | | | | Get to Know Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel It’s a municipal election year in Indiana! Across the state, we have Republican elected officials who are working hard to deliver results for their communities, and one of them is Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel. He has been mayor of Columbia City for eight years and is ready to continue serving his community. Learn more about Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel: Q: What are your biggest priorities for Columbia City if re-elected? A: I plan to continue to focus on improving the quality of life of our residents, attracting and retaining talent, investing in our citizens, and most importantly, growing our population. Q: How do you plan to get residents more involved in the decision-making process for your city? A: I plan to continue to provide clear communication and transparency during the decision-making process to Columbia City residents. I want to involve more younger residents and diversify the residents involved in our boards and commissions. Q: What is your favorite thing about Columbia City? A: My favorite thing is the kindness, generosity, and hospitality of our community. The people of my city never cease to amaze me when it comes to helping out their neighbors. Make sure to stay up-to-date with Mayor Daniel and his campaign on ! | | | | Applications Now Open: Apply for the Lugar Series Are you a woman interested in expanding your civic engagement? Are you looking for an opportunity to make an impact in your community and build your leadership skills? The Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series, now in its 30th year, was created for you! Applications are now available for the 2019-2020 class. Learn more about the program , and download the application . Applications are due next Thursday, August 1. | | | National Federation of Republican Women Convention Coming to Indiana! Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. Learn more about the convention , learn about sponsorship opportunities , and register to attend the national convention ! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Take Me Out to the Ballgame with Downtown GOP Club, GIRWC, Broad Ripple GOP Club : Fulton County Republican Party Golf Outing : Hendricks County Republican Party Golf Outing : Indiana Republican Women Tribute to Women Dinner : Indiana Republican Women Statewide Convention : Pike GOP Ice Cream Social : Adams County Golf Outing : Brown County GOP BBQ : National Federation of Republican Women Convention **Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at mailto:info@indiana.gomailto:info@indiana.go! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. name: Team Beshear
subject: Most likely to flip blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Andy Beshear has Matt Bevin running scared. Plenty of polls have shown Bevin's approval ratings underwater, so it's no surprise he's the most unpopular governor in America. Kentuckians know why: Bevin
|
---

| | Peter,

Andy Beshear has Matt Bevin _running scared_. Plenty of polls have shown Bevin's approval ratings underwater, so it's no surprise **he 's the most unpopular governor in America**. Kentuckians know why: **Bevin has tried to cut their pensions, insulted our public servants, and jeopardized health care access for thousands of Kentuckians.**

But we just heard that Matt Bevin is putting out a call for reinforcements from national Republicans. They're going to swoop into Kentucky in the hopes of bailing him out because a major publication just ranked this governorship as the **most likely to flip Democratic this cycle**. | **[DONATE NOW TO BEAT MATT BEVIN](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b25/ad6dc73/154bc8d4/db43a01/1492909207/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-govrank?refcode=20190726nd__168__&amount=5")**
---
Peter \-- we can win this race. Andy is out talking to Kentuckians every day, while Matt Bevin is hiding at out-of-state fundraisers with the Koch brothers.

Bevin can continue jet-setting around the country with his rich buddies, but Andy is going to keep traveling across Kentucky and listening to folks. Because that's what this campaign is all about: helping Kentuckians wherever they are. It's about lifting up working families, and it's about protecting health care for folks with pre-existing conditions.

Matt Bevin's been busy raking in donations from his millionaire friends, so winning in November is going to take all of us.

**It 's all hands on deck. Can you donate today to help us beat Matt Bevin?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Senate Challenger Alert via VPP
subject: Susan Collins has betrayed women across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is always willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is **always** willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate. But we'll need to support a strong, experienced Democrat in 2020 if we're going to unseat Collins -- which is why we're endorsing Democrat Sara Gideon for Senate: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070c/72412298/435be186/61022f3d/3193156653/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyNl9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1") **Sara has a clear mandate from Maine: nearly half of her donors so far have been in-state, compared to just 5% of Collins 's.** **_But Collins has raised more money after voting to confirm Kavanaugh than at any other time in her Senate caree_ r****** from right-wing forces determined to keep the Senate in GOP hands and implement their extremist agenda -- which involves taking healthcare from millions of Americans and stripping women of their reproductive rights. Peter -- Susan Collins is one of the most unpopular Senators in the nation, second only to Mitch McConnell, and her approval rating is underwater:
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070c/72412298/435be186/61022f25/3193156653/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyNl9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1")
But it'll be tough to beat Susan without a robust base of donors supporting Sara.
Sara's dedicated to job creation, improving election security, implementing common sense solutions to climate change, and supporting women's health.
We know she'll be a true voice for Maine in the Senate -- but we need to pitch in all we can to elect her, because we **won 't** be able to take back the Senate if we don't win Maine. [**Join us to support Sara with a matched donation today >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070c/72412298/435be186/61022f24/3193156653/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyNl9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Join+us+to+support+Sara+with+a+matched+d&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1")
| | [Stand with Sara >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070c/72412298/435be186/61022f27/3193156653/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyNl9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+Stand+with+Sara+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190726_SusanCollins_U1_X1")

We're ready to take back the Senate in 2020.

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Cory belongs up there with Andrew & Elizabeth & Beto & Julián & Pete & Kamala & Joe & Bernie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Just stepped out of debate prep for a minute, team -- (the boss is crushing it, thanks for asking) -- because I heard something that makes me want to jump up and down. The team tells me we're now just 2,739 donors away from the 130,000 donor threshold we need to **guarantee** Cory's spot on the fall debate stage. We think we can hit the mark by Monday before the next round of debates begins -- wanna help? [**_If you've got a dollar to spare, you have the power to get us one step closer by chipping in right now._**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190726_AD_20190726-fr-AD-nameskicker-actives_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") You don't have to be all in for Cory to agree that he belongs on that stage. The good news is we've already met the required polling threshold to qualify. But the DNC requires that every Democrat ALSO reach 130,000 unique donors to be part of the fall debates. That's a feat that's been achieved by just eight of the 25 Democrats so far: Andrew Yang, Elizabeth Warren, Beto O'Rourke, Julian Castro, Pete Buttigieg, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Bernie Sanders. **But now, Cory 's knocking on the door. And, team, it's time that door opens.** Before anyone takes the stage in the debates next week, let's make sure Cory's one of the Democrats who will be sticking around for the next one. [**_Make a donation today -- even if it 's just a buck, that counts -- and help Cory qualify for the fall debates._**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190726_AD_20190726-fr-AD-nameskicker-actives_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") OK, back to debate prep! Let's do this! Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 P.S. You're all the best. I love this team.
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190726-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190726_AD_20190726-fr-AD-nameskicker-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184427/2648017770/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184426/2648017770/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184425/2648017770/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184424/2648017770/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184423/2648017770/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc083b/5fca0d19/d228a6e/29184427/2648017770/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
